ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the department belongs to */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user belongs to */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of the event category (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event category the sub-category belongs to */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "type_level" TEXT /* Level of the event type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the event belongs to */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the event belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event category */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event sub-category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES event_sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the audit trail entry belongs to */,
  "trail_date" TEXT /* Date and time the audit trail entry was created */,
  "trail_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit trail entry */,
  "trail_level" TEXT /* Level of the audit trail entry (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
